jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Medanta - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Medanta has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Medanta:
Medanta is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medanta!
